# maxFrameDuration

**Instance Property**

The maximum duration of a frame.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc var maxFrameDuration: CMTime? { get set }
```

## Configuring Source Properties

- **activeFormatIndex**: The index of the active format.
- **frameDuration**: The duration of the frame.
